one_time_description: Correction of error: incorrectly accrued revenue of $1,076,542 related to Lagoon capital project and excessive costs of $511,240, reducing prior year accumulated surplus by $565,302
economic_notes: Nation is economically dependent on ISC funding. COVID-19 noted as significant event impacting operations. 10035134 Manitoba Ltd. is a band-owned business enterprise consolidated into statements. Samuel Thorassie land claim ongoing.
notes: Fiscal year 2021 (ended March 31, 2021). Audit report dated March 21, 2023 - significantly late, Nation did not comply with First Nations Financial Transparency Act posting deadline. Prior year figures restated due to correction of error relating to Lagoon capital project ($565,302 reduction to accumulated surplus). Five entities consolidated including 10035134 Manitoba Ltd. (business enterprise). Nation has significant amounts due to ISC ($1,014,127) from past funding recoveries spanning 2011-2021. COVID-19 noted as significant event. Legal claim of $402,764 plus unspecified damages outstanding. Total ISC per funding agreement was $27,645,146 but only $27,645,146 recognized across three revenue lines in statements. OSR calculated as rental income + other revenue + Keewatin Tribal Council + Treaty Land Entitlement + winter road + ISC recovery net.
